author: Ethan
name: LongContext 4096 + Int6 QAT + Full SOTA Stack (Safe)
blurb: Full PR #549 SOTA stack at 4096 training context with int6 QAT active from step 1 (not just late warmdown). CastedLinear applies 6-bit STE fake-quant throughout training so the model is fully hardened to int6 noise before GPTQ-lite int6 export. Safe baseline for the int4 bank-QAT risky experiment.
